content_body: Our stay at Down By The River was fun, relaxing, peaceful and absolutely wonderful! Our fisherman liked and caught tons of trout. Our explorers explored the river and tubed for miles. Our readers read to their hearts content. We visited the local towns, wandered in the woods, waved at the train each day it passed by. Enjoyed fires on the deck, and shared lots of laughs! Thank you for sharing your beautiful cabin with our family. We can't wait to come back. ~ The Gordons
title: Shared Lots Of Laughs
